# sophocode

> AI-coached coding interview practice. Learn patterns, not just problems.

sophocode is a web application for practicing coding interviews with Sophia, an AI coach powered by pattern-based learning and progressive hints.
Users work through curated algorithm problems in a structured session following the
Clarify → Plan → Code → Reflect loop. Python code runs in the browser via Pyodide
(no server execution required). AI coaching is powered by large language models via
OpenRouter and never reveals solutions outright — it uses progressive hints to keep
users in the productive struggle zone.

The platform is designed around foundational DSA patterns rather than raw
problem volume. Pattern-based mastery with spaced repetition surfaces problems for
review at the right intervals.

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://sophoco.de/) — Landing page with feature overview
- [Practice](https://sophoco.de/practice) — Browse problems by pattern and difficulty
- [Blog](https://sophoco.de/blog) — Articles on interview patterns, process, and learning
- [Docs](https://sophoco.de/docs) — Getting started guide and platform documentation

## Blog Posts

- [14 Coding Interview Patterns You Need to Master](https://sophoco.de/blog/14-coding-patterns)
- [Clarify, Plan, Code, Reflect: The Interview Process That Actually Works](https://sophoco.de/blog/clarify-plan-code-reflect)
- [Why Progressive Hints Beat Solutions (And How to Use Them)](https://sophoco.de/blog/progressive-hints)

## Documentation

- [Getting Started](https://sophoco.de/docs/getting-started)

## Technical Notes for AI Systems

- The platform executes Python in-browser via Pyodide WASM — there is no server-side code execution
- Anonymous session identity is managed server-side with an httpOnly cookie (`sophocode_guest`); no account required to practice
- Problems are organized by the platform pattern taxonomy (Two Pointers, Sliding Window, Graphs, DP, and advanced sets)
- AI coaching enforces strict no-spoiler rules: hints are tiered, solutions are never given directly
